name: payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate tracking of overtime hours causes payroll errors. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
target_audience: payroll administrators in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Tracking employee overtime hours accurately and timely.
